name: DOCUSIGN, INC.
summary: DocuSign, Inc. provides agreement management solutions including its Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform, the world's leading e-signature solution, and contract lifecycle management (CLM). As of January 31, 2026, over 1.8 million customers and more than a billion users utilize DocuSign globally. The company offers subscription-based products with over 1,100 active partner integrations, serving businesses from VSBs to global enterprises across virtually all industries.
